subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be the everlasting glory of God! Canst thou lay aside all that the people possess, and canst thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهاء الله الابدی هل تقدر ان تضع ما عند القوم کلها و هل تقدر ان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
